guide.title: Booth Walkthrough
guide.description: First time voting? Don't worry! Here is a simple walkthrough of what happens once you enter the polling booth.

01.title: First Polling Officer
01.desc: Show your Voter ID or any other approved ID card. They will check your name in the electoral roll and cross it out.

02.title: Second Polling Officer
02.desc: They will mark your left index finger with indelible ink, give you a slip, and ask for your signature in the register.

03.title: Third Polling Officer
03.desc: Hand over the slip to the third officer. They will then activate the EVM machine for you.

04.title: At the EVM
04.desc: Go inside the voting compartment. Press the blue button next to your chosen candidate's name or the NOTA button.

dos_list.1: Carry a valid ID card (Voter ID, Aadhaar, etc.)
dos_list.2: Check your booth number in advance online
dos_list.3: Follow the instructions of the polling officers
dos_list.4: Wait for the 'beep' sound after pressing the EVM button

donts_list.1: Do not take your mobile phone inside the booth
donts_list.2: Do not disclose whom you voted for inside the booth
donts_list.3: Do not crowd or loiter around the polling station
donts_list.4: Do not try to vote more than once

guide.docs_desc: While Voter ID is the primary document, you can use any of these alternatives if your name is in the roll.
guide.doc_note: Ensure your document is in original form (physical or digital via DigiLocker as per guidelines).

admin.title: Admin Control

footer.desc: Empowering every citizen with the knowledge to participate in the democratic process. Simple, transparent, and accessible election guidance for all.
